conclusion: The live ML all_names slice currently evaluates all latest daily-facts symbols; it is not dropping names because promoter or fundamental fields are missing.
The main historical exclusion visible on the latest cached panel date is the deliberate min_price >= 20 rule, not broad data loss.
The live ML market-cap universe was previously undercovered because market_cap_cr was not hydrated in build_current_feature_slice.
That live market-cap issue is now improved by merging the latest official quote snapshot and the latest full-universe official enriched snapshot already stored on disk.
